Package com.bencodez.simpleapi.dialog

Class PaperUniDialogPlatform

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.simpleapi.dialog.AbstractUniDialogPlatform
com.bencodez.simpleapi.dialog.PaperUniDialogPlatform
All Implemented Interfaces:
UniDialogPlatform
public class PaperUniDialogPlatform extends AbstractUniDialogPlatform
Paper implementation using UniDialog's Paper manager.
